scripts.dev: docker compose up --build db api client
scripts.setup: docker compose up -d --build && docker compose exec api bin/rails db:prepare && docker compose exec api bin/rails db:seed
scripts.test: docker compose exec -e RAILS_ENV=test -e DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@db:5432/api_test api bin/rails db:test:prepare test
scripts.test:api: docker compose exec -e RAILS_ENV=test -e DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@db:5432/api_test api bin/rails db:test:prepare test
scripts.test:all: npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e
